query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analise_comentarios (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresa_id INT NOT NULL,
  tipo_analise ENUM('pestel', 'swot', 'okr', 'bsc') NOT NULL,
  autor_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  autor_nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  conteudo TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_empresa_tipo (empresa_id, tipo_analise),
  INDEX idx_autor (autor_id)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analise_comentarios (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresa_id INT NOT NULL,
  tipo_analise ENUM('pestel', 'swot', 'okr', 'bsc') NOT NULL,
  autor_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  autor_nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  conteudo TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_empresa_tipo (empresa_id, tipo_analise),
  INDEX idx_autor (autor_id)
)
